notes.round_to: Prices end in .99 (e.g., $27.99) for retail psychology. Set to null to disable.
notes.price_field: Which PriceCharting field to use: loose, cib, or new
notes.minimum_profit_usd: Items below this profit threshold after fees get flagged, not auto-updated
notes.auto_apply_enabled: Set to true to auto-apply safe price changes from scheduled runs
notes.auto_apply_threshold_percent: Changes above this % need manual review
notes.max_price_change_percent: Hard limit — changes above this are rejected
